features.title: Evidence-based consistency audit and baseline reconciliation
features.description: Audit original intent, development evolution, and current implementation; produce actionable documentation reconciliation without modifying product code.
acceptance_criteria: Original baseline, later decisions, plans, and implementation facts are distinguished.
High-impact differences have evidence, impact, recommendation, and confidence.
A proposed current product baseline and human-decision list are delivered.
Only necessary authoritative documentation is revised, with an auditable revision record.
No business code, historical records, or pre-existing untracked content is modified.
dependencies: Explicit human approval after request analysis
test_needs: Evidence cross-check against source, migrations, tests, and Git history
definition_of_done: Evidence review completed or unavailable evidence documented
